title: Variable-Data Event Promo Catalog + Price-Tag Merge (Overset-Safe Auto-Fit Template)
one_line_ask: Run our variable-data merge into the auto-fit (shrink-to-fit) InDesign catalog template and the Illustrator price-tag template so long product names no longer overset, prepping the product hero art and licensed background first, and export print-ready PDFs.

assets.name: logo_master.png
assets.audit_fix: 2026-07-08 final-acceptance: original was RGB on solid white (spec requires transparent bg for image_vectorize). Regenerated clean pure-white wordmark then keyed white->true alpha (89% transparent, crisp AA edges). Artwork unchanged: 'PARTYWORKS' 2-colour blue+orange with confetti burst.

issues: Background is not fully transparent; visible checkerboard pattern indicates semi-transparency or a mockup PNG preview, not a true transparent PNG export. This will need to be fixed before vectorization.
Slight luminance noise/checkerboard pattern visible in background (transparent PNG artifact, acceptable for source file)
Confetti-burst mark is relatively small and positioned upper-right of the 'S' — slightly unconventional placement but readable
Blue and orange rays in burst mark are minimal/simple but functional for vectorization
Handle positioned to right side limits full front-face mockup utility but is acceptable for reference use
Very slight cool-grey colour cast on mug body may need correction in final deliverable
Bokeh circles are slightly large/prominent but within acceptable range for a festive reference texture
Confetti scatter is sparse at top of frame but adequate for reference purposes
Slight luminance noise visible on tabletop surface (acceptable per brief)
Minor wrinkle visible in paper backdrop (acceptable per brief)
Small amount of clutter visible in background left side including books, plants, containers (acceptable per brief — deliberate candid studio feel)
Gold and black curling ribbon strands slightly tangled at base — minor compositional density but acceptable
Window light creates mild left-side luminance gradient — acceptable natural lighting condition

assets.name: catalog_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
